name: MoP-JEPA: Hard-Assigned Predictor Mixtures for Stochastic JEPA World Models

description: arXiv:2607.05238v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: JEPA world models commonly predict the next latent state with one regressor. Under stochastic transitions, squared and cosine regression return the conditional mean and its normalized direction, respectively: a single compromise that may match no valid successor. MoP-JEPA instead uses $K$ hard-assigned heads and a context-only router to produc...
author: Zhi Song, Ximing Xing, Zhenchao Tang, hanbo Huang, Weilong Yan, Tianxu Lv, Minghao Yang, Zhongzheng Niu, Bing He, Lusheng Wang, Jianhua Yao
